title: Wasm type confusion due to custom descriptors spec ambiguity in `ref.get_desc` exactness typing
bounty_rationale: High-quality report with demonstration of RCE in a sandboxed process
description_snippet:
## README

This is a Wasm spec-level unsoundness issue. Any runtime implementing the same spec faithfully will have the same bug. I am reporting this privately to Google Chrome/V8 as Google seems to be leading the spec work and implementation of custom descriptors the first and practically has the m
